name: extract_rfp_fields
description: Extract and generate the required RFP fields with page references and reasons where applicable.

summary.description: A concise, detailed summary of the RFP that allows understanding of its main points and objectives.

fee.description: Any type of fee values mentioned in this chunk. Examples include total_fee, not_to_exceed_fee, contingency_fee, option_pricing, and so on.

fee_type.description: Type of fee, written as a key, ie total_fee, not_to_exceed_fee, etc.

fee.description: Fee details as number if available, else explanation.

pages.description: 1-based page numbers where the fee is found, separated by commas. If multiple fees are mentioned, include all relevant pages.

date.description: Proposal's due date/submission deadline entries and other important dates mentioned in RFP. Return an empty array if no dates are found.

date_type.description: Type of date, e.g., proposal_due_date, submission_deadline.

date.description: Date as written in the RFP.

pages.description: 1-based page numbers where the date appears.

best_lead_org.description: Generated best lead organization candidates based on RFP needs and internal capabilities document. Include reasons and page references. Can be multiple.

reason.description: Reason first to guide the subsequent selection.

cross_sell_opps.description: Generated cross-sell opportunities that pair RFP needs with internal capabilities document. Include reasons and page references.

reason.description: Reason first to guide the subsequent opportunity.

capabilities_for_rfp.description: Generated capabilities that best fit the RFP scope, grounded in the RFP text and internal capabilities document. Include reasons and page references.

reason.description: Reason first to guide the subsequent capability.
Reason first to justify the diversity allocation classification. If not found, state that explicitly.

diversity_allocation.description: True if the RFP has diversity allocation requirements, otherwise false.

pages.description: 1-based page numbers where diversity allocation is discussed. Use an empty array if not found.
